title: MSN

title: Zambia : KCM to be reorganised and restructured into two subsidiary companies effective February 1, 2021
impact_evidence: Environmental | Land, Soil & Geology | Tailings generation and management -> "The 500 TPD Acid Plant and Tailings Dams will be part of Konkola Mineral Resources Limited." || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Employment creation and job security -> "All employees directly working for Konkola Copper Mines will be offered new contracts of employment in either of the two new companies i.e. KCM Smelter Co Limited or Konkola Mineral Resources Limited." | "The employees, who are currently working for KCM, will all be paid severance packages in agreed form to ensure that all old liabilities are cleared, and reengaged seamlessly by the two separate Companies, with no job losses." || Social | Quality of Work Life | Labor conditions and workplace dignity -> "The employees' basic conditions of service will remain unchanged until after the Managements of the two Companies and Unions Collective Bargaining commences and is concluded as per agreed calendar of negotiations." || Governance | Stakeholder Engagement & Rights | Stakeholder inclusion in decision-making -> "The restructuring decision has undergone wide consultations with key stakeholders, chief among them relevant Authorities, Labour Unions representing workers at KCM and the Company Management."
